info.title: BillingTrust Management API
info.description: Microsoft.BillingTrust resource provider. Provides Assessment and Rule resources used to evaluate trust attributes (such as education-domain qualification and business verification) of a billing account.

put.description: Create or update an Assessment. Long-running operation — returns 200 (replace) or 201 (create) with the `Azure-AsyncOperation` polling header on both responses.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

delete.description: Delete an assessment. Long-running operation — returns 202 + 204 + default with `Azure-AsyncOperation` (preferred) and `Location` polling headers.

Azure-AsyncOperation.description: A link to the status monitor

Location.description: The Location header contains the URL where the status of the long running operation can be checked.

Retry-After.description: The Retry-After header can indicate how long the client should wait before polling the operation status.

post.description: Request a time-bound, principal-bound upload token for supplemental document uploads.

parameters.name: ruleName
parameters.description: The name of the rule. Rules are created by the service when the parent assessment is created — the available rule names are determined by the assessment template. Names start with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

put.description:
Create or update a Rule. **This operation is required for RPaaS tracked-resource
cache population and MUST remain in the public spec.** Rules are created by the
service when the parent assessment is created; they are not directly creatable
by end users. All customer PUT calls are rejected at runtime with
`OperationNotAllowed` via the RPaaS ResourceCreationValidate extension.
Use PATCH to modify rule fields that the customer is authorized to change.
Peer RPs with the same topology (extension singleton parent + proxy child)
declare an identical public PUT for the same RPaaS cache-population reason:
Microsoft.ScVmm/virtualMachineInstances/guestAgents,
Microsoft.ConnectedVMwarevSphere/virtualMachineInstances/guestAgents.

parameters.name: ruleName
parameters.description: The name of the rule. Rules are created by the service when the parent assessment is created — the available rule names are determined by the assessment template. Names start with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

patch.description: Update a Rule. The PATCH body is discriminated by `kind` and must match the existing rule's kind. For `eduQualification` rules, only `supplementalDocuments` is patchable, and only when `evaluationState == actionRequired`. For `businessVerification` rules, the patchable fields are `supplementalDocuments` and `externalId`, and only when `evaluationState` is `pending` or `actionRequired`. All other field/state combinations are rejected with 400 InvalidParameterValue or 409 RuleNotActionable.

parameters.name: ruleName
parameters.description: The name of the rule. Rules are created by the service when the parent assessment is created — the available rule names are determined by the assessment template. Names start with an alphanumeric character and may contain letters, digits, underscores, and hyphens.

parameters.name: properties
parameters.description: The resource properties to be updated.

get.description: List the operations for the provider

Assessment.description: A billing trust assessment. An assessment runs a set of rules to evaluate trust attributes of a billing account. The assessment is a singleton per parent resource and is always named 'default'. Re-issuing PUT with the same `assessmentType` is idempotent; changing `assessmentType` after the assessment exists is not supported.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

AssessmentListResult.description: The response of a Assessment list operation.

value.description: The Assessment items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

AssessmentProperties.description: The properties of an Assessment resource

assessmentType.description: The name of the assessment template whose rules will be evaluated (e.g. 'Edu'). Immutable after creation.

evaluationState.description: The aggregated evaluation state of all active rules within this assessment

nextEvaluation.description: The next scheduled re-evaluation of this assessment. Only present when one or more rules in this assessment have a configured recurrence.

error.description: Error information when evaluationState is failed

initialValues.description: Optional initial values applied to the rules created with this assessment. Write-only — these values are routed to the per-kind rules and are not returned on read.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource

AssessmentState.description: The aggregated evaluation state of an assessment, derived from its rules

values.name: Pending
values.description: One or more rules have not reached a steady state

values.name: Running
values.description: One or more rules are currently being evaluated

values.name: ActionRequired
values.description: One or more rules require user action

values.name: UnderReview
values.description: One or more rules require manual review

values.name: Failed
values.description: All rules reached a steady state, and the last non-skipped rule failed

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: All rules reached a steady state, and the last non-skipped rule succeeded

values.name: SucceededWithOverride
values.description: Assessment succeeded but with a manual override applied by operations

values.name: FailedWithOverride
values.description: Assessment failed but with a manual override applied by operations

values.name: Expired
values.description: Assessment expired and requires re-evaluation

AssessmentType.description: Assessment template name. Each template defines a fixed set of rules and their configuration. The list of templates may be extended in future API versions.

values.name: Edu
values.description: Education qualification assessment. Verifies that the billing account qualifies for education programs based on customer-supplied domains.

values.name: BusinessVerification
values.description: Business verification assessment. Verifies the billing account's business identity against the sold-to information on file.

values.name: PayeeEnrollment
values.description: Payee enrollment assessment. Verifies a billing account is eligible to enroll as a payee. Rule names within this template may change between API versions — iterate `rules` via LIST rather than addressing rules by name.

values.name: PayeeProfile
values.description: Payee profile assessment. Verifies the payee profile associated with a billing account. Rule names within this template may change between API versions — iterate `rules` via LIST rather than addressing rules by name.

BusinessVerificationRulePatchProperties.description: Patch body for a businessVerification rule. Settable while evaluationState is `pending` or `actionRequired`. `externalId` lets the customer disambiguate an ambiguous verification match (e.g. via DUNS); `supplementalDocuments` carries references to documents uploaded via the assessment-scoped upload-token action.

externalId.description: Optional external-registry identifier (e.g. DUNS) used to disambiguate ambiguous verification matches.

supplementalDocuments.description: References to supplemental documents (businessVerification rules only; only settable while evaluationState is `pending` or `actionRequired`).

BusinessVerificationRuleProperties.description:
Properties of a business verification rule. Verifies the billing account's
business identity.

Sold-to fields (`soldTo`, `registrationNumber`, `taxIds`) reflect the billing
account's information on file and cannot be supplied by end users.

soldTo.description: Sold-to identity used for business verification. Populated from the billing account at the time the rule is created. Server-managed.

registrationNumber.description: Registration number context (allowed types and registration id). Populated from the billing account at the time the rule is created. Server-managed.

taxIds.description: Tax ids associated with the sold-to identity. Populated from the billing account at the time the rule is created. Server-managed.

externalId.description: Optional external-registry identifier (e.g. DUNS) used to disambiguate verification matches. Settable on PATCH while `evaluationState` is `pending` or `actionRequired`.

supplementalDocuments.description: References to supplemental documents (businessVerification rules only; only settable while evaluationState is `pending` or `actionRequired`).

DomainEntry.description: A domain entry within an education qualification rule. `domainNames` and `tenantId` are supplied on creation; `state` and `error` are returned by the service.

domainNames.description: Domain names associated with a tenant.

tenantId.description: The Microsoft Entra tenant ID owning these domains. Defaults to the calling user's tenant when omitted.

state.description: The verification state of this domain entry. Server-managed.

error.description: Error detail when state is `failed` or `actionRequired`. Omitted otherwise. Server-managed.

DomainEntryState.description: The verification state of a single domain entry within an eduQualification rule

values.name: Pending
values.description: Domain verification queued or in progress

values.name: ActionRequired
values.description: Customer must supply additional evidence (e.g. supplemental documents)

values.name: Failed
values.description: Domain verification failed

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: Domain verification succeeded

EduInitialValue.description: Initial values for an education qualification rule. Per-domain entries (`domainNames` + `tenantId`) are used to populate the rule when the assessment is created.

domains.description: Per-domain entries to use when populating the education qualification rule. Only `domainNames` and `tenantId` are read from this payload; `state` and `error` on each entry are populated by the service.

EduQualificationRulePatchProperties.description: Patch body for an eduQualification rule. Only `supplementalDocuments` is settable, and only when evaluationState == actionRequired.

supplementalDocuments.description: References to supplemental documents (eduQualification rules only; only settable when evaluationState == actionRequired).

EduQualificationRuleProperties.description: Properties of an eduQualification rule. Verifies education-domain ownership for a billing account.

supplementalDocuments.description: References to supplemental documents. Settable only when evaluationState is `actionRequired`.

ExternalId.description: External-registry identifier (e.g. DUNS) used to disambiguate ambiguous verification matches.

value.description: Identifier value (e.g. the DUNS number string).

GenerateUploadTokenResponse.description: Response containing an upload token for supplemental document uploads

InitialRuleValueBase.description: Base type for write-only initial values supplied when creating an assessment. Polymorphic by `kind`; per-kind initial values forward into the corresponding rule.

kind.description: The kind of rule to initialize

ProvisioningState.description: The status of the current operation

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: Resource has been created.

values.name: Failed
values.description: Resource creation failed.

values.name: Canceled
values.description: Resource creation was canceled.

values.name: Provisioning
values.description: The resource is being provisioned

values.name: Updating
values.description: The resource is updating

values.name: Accepted
values.description: The resource create request has been accepted

RegistrationNumber.description: Registration number context for business verification.

type.description: Allowed registration-number types based on the billing-account country (e.g. `VAT`, `GST`, `EIN`).

value.description: Registration number value (e.g. the VAT / GST / EIN identifier string).

registrationRequirement.description: Whether a registration number is required for the sold-to country.

RegistrationRequirement.description: Whether a registration number is required for the sold-to country. Extensible — additional states may be introduced as country-specific tax requirements evolve.

values.name: Required
values.description: A registration number is required for the sold-to country.

values.name: Optional
values.description: A registration number is optional for the sold-to country.

values.name: NotApplicable
values.description: A registration number is not applicable for the sold-to country.

properties.description: The resource-specific properties for this resource.

RuleKind.description: The kind of rule. Additional kinds may be added in future API versions.

values.name: EduQualification
values.description: Education qualification rule. Verifies education-domain ownership for the billing account.

values.name: BusinessVerification
values.description: Business verification rule. Verifies the business identity of the billing account.

RuleListResult.description: The response of a Rule list operation.

value.description: The Rule items on this page

nextLink.description: The link to the next page of items

RulePatchProperties.description: Patch body for updating a rule. Polymorphic by `kind` — kind-specific patchable fields live on per-kind subtypes. PATCH cannot change a rule's kind; the discriminator carries the rule's existing kind for routing only.

kind.description: The kind of rule. Acts as a discriminator for per-kind patchable fields. Must match the existing rule's kind; PATCH cannot mutate kind.

RuleProperties.description: Base properties of a Rule resource. Polymorphic by `kind` — kind-specific writable fields live on derived models.

kind.description: The kind of rule. Acts as a discriminator for kind-specific properties.

evaluationState.description: The evaluation state of the rule. Server-managed.

error.description: Error information when evaluationState is `failed` or `actionRequired`. Server-managed.

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource

RuleState.description: The evaluation state of a rule

values.name: Pending
values.description: Rule is queued and not yet evaluated

values.name: Running
values.description: Rule evaluation is in progress

values.name: ActionRequired
values.description: Customer input is required to proceed

values.name: UnderReview
values.description: Operations review is in progress

values.name: Skipped
values.description: Rule preconditions (runAfter) were not met; rule was skipped

values.name: Failed
values.description: Rule evaluation failed

values.name: Succeeded
values.description: Rule evaluation succeeded

values.name: SucceededWithOverride
values.description: Rule succeeded but with a manual override applied by operations

values.name: FailedWithOverride
values.description: Rule failed but with a manual override applied by operations

values.name: Expired
values.description: Rule expired and requires re-evaluation

SoldTo.description:
Sold-to identity used for business verification.

**Data classification — Personally Identifiable Information (PII):** This
model carries customer/contact PII (names, email, phone, postal address).
Producers (service code paths populating SoldTo) and consumers (anything
emitting it to logs / telemetry) MUST treat individual field values as
PII and avoid clear-text logging. BillingTrust's existing runtime
discipline keeps SoldTo out of Geneva logs (see
`Services/Rpaas/RpaasRuleProjector.cs` — raw bodies and parsed error
messages are filtered before emission). Downstream consumers of the
public OpenAPI surface should follow the same convention. Tracked for
follow-up alignment with ARM ARG002 (control-plane PII guidance) — see
PR description.

addressLine1.description: First address line. PII — postal address.

addressLine2.description: Second address line. PII — postal address.

addressLine3.description: Third address line. PII — postal address.

city.description: City of the address. PII — postal address.

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code of the sold-to address (e.g. `US`, `IE`, `GB`). Populated from the billing account.

district.description: District or sub-region. PII — postal address.

phoneNumber.description: Contact phone number (free-form string; format not validated server-side). PII — contact.

postalCode.description: Postal or ZIP code. PII — postal address.

region.description: State, province, or region. PII — postal address.

TaxId.description: Tax id entry associated with the sold-to identity.

value.description: Tax id value (e.g. the VAT / GST / EIN identifier string).

country.description: ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code the tax id is registered in.

type.description: Type of tax id (e.g. `VAT`, `GST`, `EIN`). Extensible — additional types may be returned as upstream registries evolve.

TaxIdStatus.description: Status of a tax id record.

values.name: Valid
values.description: The tax id has been verified and is currently valid.

values.name: Invalid
values.description: The tax id is no longer valid (e.g. expired or revoked).

values.name: Other
values.description: Status could not be determined from the upstream registry.

Azure.ResourceManager.ResourceUriParamet.description: The fully qualified Azure Resource manager identifier of the resource.
